source: hand-authored by Ishaan + Claude, 2026-07-07; granularity anchor: 'integration-by-parts' is one concept

concepts.name: Riemann Sums & Area Approximation
concepts.desc: Left/right/midpoint endpoint sums, upper/lower sums, sigma notation, approximating area under a curve with n subintervals

concepts.name: The Definite Integral
concepts.desc: Definition as limit of Riemann sums, integral properties, net signed area vs total area, comparison properties

concepts.name: Fundamental Theorem of Calculus
concepts.desc: FTC part 1 (derivative of an accumulation function) and part 2 (evaluation theorem)

concepts.name: Antiderivatives & Basic Integration Rules
concepts.desc: Indefinite integrals, power rule, basic trig/polynomial antiderivatives, initial value problems via integration

concepts.name: Average Value of a Function
concepts.desc: Average value over an interval, Mean Value Theorem for integrals

concepts.name: Substitution (u-substitution)
concepts.desc: Change of variables for indefinite and definite integrals

concepts.name: Integrals of Exponential & Logarithmic Functions
concepts.desc: Integrals involving e^x, a^x, 1/x, ln x

concepts.name: Integrals Resulting in Inverse Trig Functions
concepts.desc: Integrals producing arcsin, arctan, arcsec forms

concepts.name: Area Between Curves
concepts.desc: Region area via top-minus-bottom or right-minus-left, intersection finding, compound regions

concepts.name: Volumes by Slicing (Disks/Washers)
concepts.desc: Solids of revolution via disk and washer methods, solids with known cross-sections

concepts.name: Volumes by Cylindrical Shells
concepts.desc: Shell method for solids of revolution

concepts.name: Arc Length & Surface Area
concepts.desc: Arc length of y=f(x) curves, surface area of solids of revolution

concepts.name: Physical Applications of Integration
concepts.desc: Work (springs, pumping), hydrostatic force, mass from density, moments and center of mass

concepts.name: Exponential Growth & Decay
concepts.desc: y=y0*e^(kt) models, doubling time, half-life, compound interest, Newton's law of cooling

concepts.name: Calculus of Hyperbolic Functions
concepts.desc: Derivatives and integrals of sinh/cosh/tanh, inverse hyperbolic functions, catenary

concepts.name: Integration by Parts
concepts.desc: ∫u dv = uv − ∫v du, LIATE, repeated/cyclic applications, definite-integral form

concepts.name: Trigonometric Integrals
concepts.desc: Powers and products of sin/cos/tan/sec, reduction of even/odd powers

concepts.name: Trigonometric Substitution
concepts.desc: Substitutions for sqrt(a^2−x^2), sqrt(a^2+x^2), sqrt(x^2−a^2) forms

concepts.name: Partial Fraction Decomposition
concepts.desc: Integrating rational functions via decomposition: linear, repeated, irreducible quadratic factors

concepts.name: Numerical Integration
concepts.desc: Midpoint rule, trapezoidal rule, Simpson's rule, error bounds

concepts.name: Improper Integrals
concepts.desc: Infinite limits of integration, discontinuous integrands, convergence/divergence, comparison

concepts.name: Basics of Differential Equations
concepts.desc: Order, verifying solutions, general vs particular solutions, initial-value problems, direction fields, Euler's method

concepts.name: Separable Differential Equations
concepts.desc: Separation of variables, applications to mixing and cooling problems

concepts.name: The Logistic Equation
concepts.desc: Logistic growth model, carrying capacity, threshold behavior

concepts.name: First-Order Linear Differential Equations
concepts.desc: Standard form, integrating factors, applications

concepts.name: Sequences
concepts.desc: Explicit/recursive sequences, limits of sequences, monotone and bounded sequences, convergence

concepts.name: Infinite Series & Partial Sums
concepts.desc: Series as limit of partial sums, geometric series, telescoping series, harmonic series, arithmetic properties

concepts.name: Divergence & Integral Tests
concepts.desc: nth-term divergence test, integral test, p-series, remainder estimates

concepts.name: Comparison Tests
concepts.desc: Direct comparison and limit comparison tests for series

concepts.name: Alternating Series
concepts.desc: Alternating series test, remainder bound, absolute vs conditional convergence

concepts.name: Ratio & Root Tests
concepts.desc: Ratio test and root test for convergence, strategy for choosing a test

concepts.name: Power Series & Interval of Convergence
concepts.desc: Radius and interval of convergence, power series as functions, geometric power series

concepts.name: Properties & Operations on Power Series
concepts.desc: Combining, multiplying, differentiating, integrating power series term-by-term

concepts.name: Taylor & Maclaurin Series
concepts.desc: Taylor polynomials, Taylor's theorem with remainder, standard Maclaurin series, convergence to f

concepts.name: Working with Taylor Series
concepts.desc: Binomial series, series solutions of problems, approximating integrals and limits with series

concepts.name: Parametric Equations & Curves
concepts.desc: Parameterizations, eliminating the parameter, graphing parametric curves, cycloids

concepts.name: Calculus of Parametric Curves
concepts.desc: dy/dx and d2y/dx2 for parametric curves, arc length, area under parametric curves, surface area

concepts.name: Polar Coordinates & Curves
concepts.desc: Polar/rectangular conversion, graphing polar curves (roses, cardioids, limaçons), symmetry

concepts.name: Area & Arc Length in Polar Coordinates
concepts.desc: Region area via (1/2)∫r^2 dθ, intersections of polar curves, polar arc length

concepts.name: Conic Sections
concepts.desc: Parabolas, ellipses, hyperbolas, eccentricity, conics in polar coordinates
